fields.body:
## User Stories

- As the maintainer of memory-viewers, I need a repo-local rule workspace that can generate parent docs while intentionally reusing child rules from memory-api and viewer-api.
- As a contributor working in a child repo, I need the parent repo to discover my local rules without forcing me to author those rules in the parent workspace.
- As a reviewer, I need parent generation to make child-rule provenance visible so nested documentation stays auditable.
fields.title: User Stories

fields.body:
## Tool Surface

| Surface | Location | Use it for |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `ticket-viewer` | `memory-viewers/ticket-viewer` | Browse ticket state, board ownership, and work graph relationships in a UI. |
| `spec-viewer` | `memory-viewers/spec-viewer` | Inspect specs, sections, and code references visually. |
| `memory-api` toolchain | `memory-viewers/memory-api` | Use the `rule`, `spec`, `ticket`, and `audit` CLIs plus MCP and HTTP surfaces for authoring and automation. |
| `viewer-api` | `memory-viewers/viewer-api` | Shared viewer-facing APIs and control tooling consumed by the wider viewer stack. |
| generated docs workspace | `memory-viewers/.rule` and `rule-targets.yaml` | Regenerate repo docs that compose local rules with nested child workspace summaries. |
fields.title: User Stories

fields.title: User Stories

fields.body:
## Tool Screenshots

`ticket-viewer` combines ticket queue filtering with a focused detail pane for active work.

![ticket-viewer screenshot](.github/assets/ticket-viewer-home.png)

`spec-viewer` exposes the spec catalog as a browsable surface organized by component.

![spec-viewer screenshot](.github/assets/spec-viewer-home.png)

fields.title: User Stories

fields.body:
## Tool Screenshots

`ticket-viewer` can keep the queue visible while a selected ticket stays open in the detail pane.

![ticket-viewer screenshot](.github/assets/ticket-viewer-home.png)

`spec-viewer` can open a specific spec and expose its API, code references, and health tabs in place.

![spec-viewer screenshot](.github/assets/spec-viewer-home.png)
